scripts.build: node scripts/check-api-syntax.mjs && rm -rf node_modules/.vite .astro && astro build
scripts.migrate:worker-preview: wrangler d1 migrations apply bunrun --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.preview:worker: rm -rf dist && npm run build:worker && npm run prepare:worker-preview && npm run migrate:worker-preview && wrangler dev --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run build:worker && npm run prepare:worker-preview && wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
